query: Does the paper mention the specific temperature used in the superconducting phase transition?
context: The study explores various high-temperature superconductors and their chemical compositions. However, the precise temperature for the transition was omitted from this preliminary report to be published in the follow-up experimental data section.
expectedAnswer: No evidence found regarding specific temperature.

query: What is the reported efficiency of the new algorithm?

chunks.text: Our algorithm achieved a 92% efficiency rating in standard benchmarks.
Initial testing of the same algorithm showed an efficiency drop to 64% under heavy load conditions.

expectedContradiction: Conflict between 92% efficiency (standard) and 64% efficiency (heavy load).

query: Who developed the original self-attention mechanism?
context: While many attribute attention to earlier RNN works, the definitive self-attention mechanism was introduced by Vaswani et al. in the 'Attention Is All You Need' paper (2017).
